title: Agent session tabs component with selection and close functionality
purpose: Displays a list of agent sessions as tabs with active state indication, unread badges, and optional close buttons.

steps.content: Extract the multi-session data from the agent store.
Get the active session ID and all session entries.
IF there are no sessions, return null.
Render a tablist container with session entries.
For each session entry, determine if it is active.
IF the session is not active but has unread messages, show a badge.
Render each session tab with appropriate styling based on active state.
Attach click handlers to tabs for selection and close buttons.
